nasb.text: In the first year of Darius the son of Ahasuerus, of Median descent, who was made king over the kingdom of the Chaldeans—

esv.text: In the first year of Darius the son of Ahasuerus, by descent a Mede, who was made king over the realm of the Chaldeans—

cnv.text: 瑪代人亞哈隨魯的兒子大利烏被立為王，統治迦勒底國的第一年，

ccb.text: 玛代人亚哈随鲁的儿子大流士被立为迦勒底国的王元年，
